_doc: Auto-generated by generate_scenario.py. Adjusted: docsai -> passthrough (per tests CLAUDE.md); the original session used a $K shell variable for the job key AND piped each call to a file with exit-marker echoes, so the recorded 'or jobs get $K' rule was rewritten to the literal key de11f5f7-... and the corrupted exit-marker fixtures (EXIT=0 trailers) were rebuilt from the investigation raw/ responses with PII scrubbed. Match strings shortened to robust substrings for the substring dispatcher.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by rules returns an empty array.
